nasb.text: For just as you once were disobedient to God, but now have been shown mercy because of their disobedience,

esv.text: For just as you were at one time disobedient to God but now have received mercy because of their disobedience,

cnv.text: 正如你們從前不順服　神，現在卻因著他們的不順服，你們倒蒙了憐憫；

ccb.text: 你们从前不顺服上帝，然而因为他们的不顺服，你们现在反蒙了怜悯。

csbs.text: 正如你们以前不肯信从神而现在却因他们的不信从反而蒙了怜悯；
